title: Manufacturing Engineer - Charak Pharma - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Charak Pharma - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!
